question: List all distinct types of powertrain of vehicles.

back_translation.intent: 获取不同的动力系统类型
filters: name IN ('Chevrolet Spark EV', 'Honda Fit EV', 'Fiat 500e', 'Nissan Leaf', 'Mitsubishi i')

semantic.reason: 过滤条件存在差异，原始问题未指定任何过滤条件，而SQL反向翻译描述中添加了name IN ('Chevrolet Spark EV', 'Honda Fit EV', 'Fiat 500e', 'Nissan Leaf', 'Mitsubishi i')的限制条件，导致结果范围缩小
